docs:
# Tooltip
Directional tooltips for adding quick context around interactions.
## Import
```tsx
import { Tooltip } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Tooltip content="I follow your cursor" side="top" checked={undefined} disabled={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **content** (string) — default: `"I follow your cursor"`: Content
- **side** (string) — default: `"top"`: Side
- **checked** (boolean): Checked
- **disabled** (boolean): Disabled
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add tooltip
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/tooltip
```

meta.usageExample: <Tooltip content="I follow your cursor" side="top" checked={undefined} disabled={undefined} />
